resources: # this block is mandatory and contains all resource declarations your templates must provide under their top-level keys, these values will be merged with --vars at runtime to create deployment.json that gets rendered on upload or by other means specified via -var/--varfile flag(s) if present in the same template
outputs: # this block is optional and contains output variables your templates may expose under their top-level keys, these values will be merged with --vars at runtime to create deployment.json that gets rendered on upload or by other means specified via -var/--varfile flag(s) if present in the same template
